story_intro_1: In the 10th century, after the death of King Ngo, the country fell into the 'Chaos of the 12 Warlords'.
story_intro_2: War smoke filled the sky, people suffered, and the territory was divided by local lords.
story_intro_3: From the sacred land of Hoa Lu, a talented young man emerged with outstanding military skills.
story_intro_4: With reed flowers as flags and the ambition to end the chaos, Dinh Bo Linh began his journey to unify the land!
world_1_desc: Clan civil war: Facing Dinh Thuc Du.
world_1_intro: To settle the world, one must first control the base at Hoa Lu. His uncle, Dinh Thuc Du, is challenging Dinh Bo Linh's authority.
world_1_outro: Hoa Lu Cave has surrendered. The swift Cu Su soldiers have joined your ranks.
world_2_desc: Joining forces with Lord Tran Lam in Thai Binh.
world_2_intro: The prosperous Thai Binh land is under Tran Minh Cong's rule. Prove your strength to form an alliance with this powerful force.
world_2_outro: Tran Lam admired your talent and handed over military power. Elite Archers are ready for battle.
world_3_desc: Great battle against Do Canh Thac.
world_3_intro: Do Canh Thac is a cunning warlord ruling the treacherous Thanh Oai region. This is the biggest obstacle on your advance.
world_3_outro: Do Dong Fortress has fallen. The armored Heavy soldiers have submitted to Dinh Bo Linh.
world_4_desc: Defeating Kieu Tam Che at Phong Chau.
world_4_intro: Kieu Cong Han is guarding the gateway to the Northwest at Phong Chau. A key battle to open the path to unification.
world_4_outro: Kieu Tam Che was defeated. The resilient Shield warriors have joined the army.
world_5_intro: Lord Ly Khue of Sieu Loai (Bac Ninh) is famously stubborn. Use force to end this separation.
world_5_outro: Sieu Loai has been pacified. The prestige of the 'Van Thang Vuong' spreads everywhere.
world_6_desc: Taking over the land of Lord Ngo Nhat Khanh.
world_6_intro: Ngo Nhat Khanh carries royal blood and guards Duong Lam. A battle not just for land, but for justice.
world_6_outro: The forces are strong enough. Reinforcements from all over are gathering under Van Thang Vuong.
world_7_desc: The final battle, ascending the throne.
world_7_intro: The 12 warlords have been settled, only the last remnants remain. Advance, crown yourself, and establish the Dinh Dynasty!
world_7_outro: The chaos of the 12 warlords ends. Dinh Bo Linh becomes Emperor Dinh Tien Hoang, naming the country Dai Co Viet.
world_7_outro_2: The country is unified. Congratulations, you have become a legendary king!
